response.justification: Bogdan is a strong individual contributor with 15+ years of software development and genuine developer-tooling experience (test runners, CI/CD setup, testing libraries, MCP code generators), but this role is fundamentally a people-management position. There is zero evidence of direct reports, performance management, hiring, or team leadership in any of his roles. The 'Staff' titles reflect technical seniority, not organizational leadership. Without the 2-year minimum people-management requirement being met even approximately, advancing this candidate for an Engineering Manager role is premature regardless of his technical depth.
strengths: Authentic developer-tooling experience: built production test runners (Trial), testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD pipelines, and AI-agent/MCP frameworks
15+ years of broad technical experience across embedded, mobile, web, and infrastructure — spans the ecosystem a productivity team must support
Strong knowledge-sharing orientation: created and delivered multi-day workshops, Selenium courses, and recurring Refactoring Dojos, suggesting coaching instincts
concerns: No people management experience at all — no mention of direct reports, performance reviews, career development conversations, or hiring across any role
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership, cross-team alignment, or organizational change leadership at any scope
Mobile-platform depth is thin (one brief iOS stint at WatchUp in 2015–2016) and not framed around the productivity/build-system angle the role requires

key_factors.factor: No leadership scope or org-change experience
